name: maxinger15-music
description: AI music generation workflow for Suno: album concepts, lyrics, prompts, mastering, and release prep.

interface.shortDescription: Album production workflow for Suno and Codex
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native music production workflow for developing album concepts, writing and reviewing lyrics, preparing Suno prompts, managing generation state, polishing/mastering audio, and preparing release assets.
defaultPrompt: Use maxinger15 Music to resume an album.
